channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

Videos of a stress toy resembling a Black baby being violently mishandled have been trending on social media in China. The videos are drawing outrage from people who say they are racist and normalize the dehumanization of Black people. #dwcurrentaffair - facebook.com
